name: Fish Fillets in Zucchinni Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet and gently fry fish until golden brown (approximately 4 minutes). Remove from the pan and keep warm.
2. Saute the zucchini in the same pan until cooked but not soggy, then stir in the buttermilk, sour cream, and seasonings.
3. Pour the sauce over the fish fillets, top with a little grated cheese.
4. Melt under a low heat for one to two minutes and serve.
